== Notes for [[Item:Q83666|Q83666]] ==

« Al-Qâ'im bi-l-Haqq » Muhammad ben Zayd Killed (in 867) during battle with Amir Ismail Samani page 153 of Iranian History at a Glance, Reza Shabani.

He succeded his brother Hassan in 849. He was defeated by Omar Leith in Khorassan (Amr ibn al-Layth, a Saffarid) https://www.geni.com/people/Amir-Amr-ibn-al-Layth-Saffarid-r-879-901/6000000171746856370

https://iranicaonline.org/articles/alids-of-tabarestan-daylaman-and-gilan

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3142D1D771EFBC189822EF79916CF38B
geni:6000000000163192728

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
